description: Stable diagnostic identifiers emitted by the gaussian-sog plugin. Codes are never renumbered or reused; messages may be reworded. Every message starts with its bracketed code, e.g. "[GSSOG-E001] ...".

diagnostics.summary: SOG import is not implemented in this release.
diagnostics.action: SOG v2 one-object import is the v0.5.0 theme; upgrade to a release that ships the SOG decoder. This build only recognizes the format.
